tema_principal: El sedentarismo está destruyendo tu metabolismo lentamente. Si caminas 30 minutos al día, reactivas tu sistema cardiovascular y extiendes tu expectativa de vida.

escenas.prompt_visual_ia: Cinematic close up of a person sitting on a couch, surrounded by unhealthy snacks and screens.
escenas.texto_en_pantalla: La sedentaria es una sentencia de muerte

escenas.prompt_visual_ia: Wide shot of a person lying in bed, with a clock ticking in the background, symbolizing the passing of time.
A person standing in front of a city skyline, with a neutral expression.
A person walking in a park, with a calm and peaceful atmosphere.
Cinematic close up of a person walking on a treadmill, with a determined expression.
Wide shot of a person running in a park, with a sunny and happy atmosphere.
Cinematic close up of a person doing yoga, with a calm and peaceful expression.
escenas.texto_en_pantalla: Y extiende tu expectativa de vida

escenas.prompt_visual_ia: Wide shot of a person smiling, with a happy and healthy atmosphere.
